issues.msg: ALL attributions in same direction -- highly suspicious, suggests degenerate model
Internal Bliss DIFFERENT from literature (p=0.0000) -- bias confirmed
issues.detail: Internal mean=17.4 vs lit mean=9.7 (overclaim by +7.8)

issues.msg: Internal synergy inflated by +7.8 Bliss units vs literature
issues.detail: Published papers using internal Bliss values must note this upward bias.

issues.msg: 5 alleles bootstrap CI misses meta frequency
issues.detail: Expected: n=26 too small for stable freq estimate. Must report as "imputed, uncertain".

issues.msg: D4=3.38 -- check if report uses corrected value 3.00
OS/PFS R2=0.303 is an improvement (from 0.056) but still moderate
issues.detail: This is because arm effect was hard-coded into synthetic cohort -- the improvement reflects data redesign, NOT real clinical signal improvement. Must be disclosed as "improved synthetic design, not real RCT validation".

issues.msg: Internal Bliss mean 17.4 vs literature 9.7 (+7.7 units, p<0.0001)
issues.detail: Any claims using internal Bliss synergy values overstate synergy by ~80%. Downward recalibration or explicit bias disclosure required for publication.

issues.msg: Official LIME Cmax direction still not consistently positive (50/50)
issues.detail: This reflects that the GBM v5 model still does not fully capture PK-outcome mechanism even with improved cohort. Cmax frequency alone is not sufficient evidence.

issues.msg: Near-CF mean delta=+4.71 may be inflated
issues.detail: The greedy algorithm is designed to find any feature change that increases prediction. If the model is noisy, small feature perturbations may accidentally land on noise peaks. Validate with held-out patients to confirm delta is clinically meaningful.
